sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108793" key="u(pomi/aros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπομίᾰρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of a word, <sense id="n108793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unclassical,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
